item.title: I alphabetized DVD movies in order by title from A-Z at my local library recently
item.description: I'm an intern at my local library and I'm proud of my job. I recently sorted out physical media copies of movies going in alphabetical order by title Check it out!

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @StudioC2 drew this and I think it's great! Check out their posts for lots of other art they've done.
27 Man Tax: Trey Songz
“The hope of a secure and livable world lies with disciplined nonconformists who are dedicated to justice, peace and brotherhood.” - Martin Luther King, Jr. So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 ***Also if you miss abbiistabbii's discord community good news! Here's the new one https://discord.gg/NPStJGgARq - where everyone's reconnecting, shitposting, and hanging out again*** https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: For is who don't see color: cops do, banks do, colleges do, job applications do, sentencing statistics do
item.description: Unnamed gentleman from Grand Rapids, Michigan speaks out against police corruption seeking support of the killing of Da'Quain Johnson. Racial profiling goes BOTH ways. FP edit thanks to all for watching and supporting this message. A deeper conversation is the solidarity power of white men. Keeping heads down, not making trouble, not being racist, not being active misogynists is tacit compliance to the orphan crushing machine. White men hold densely compacted cultural capitol in western society. 90% of the vote, 90% of the wealth, 90% of positions of power are white men (illustrative figures, not factual). When white men begin to vote, buy, endorse, speak up for gays, women, black and brown people, the heaving mass of the bell curve begins to shift. With great privilege comes great responsibility. If you're white and want to get involved, hell yes. It's not "not your fight," it's everyones fight. Thank you, keep sharing our lives and our stories together it makes us stronger.
item.dc:creator: theSoulciologist

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
one more week. and a day. i can do dis.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the deviousness discord where they share artwork and sometimes do drawings based on word prompts given by members. its a lot of fun! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have movie nights on Saturdays! So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness If you have issues with link see dis: https://imgur.com/a/8GUNAz4 Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post and also post the memes that get removed: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe #potato #memes #dailydirties #makinmywaydowntown #holdinhandstothefrontpage
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: I was NOT emotionally prepared for this
item.description:
I honestly don't know what I was expecting other than some feel good moments from nostalgia and yet current times....remembering when things weren't so bad...I don't know what I thought this was going to be like...but I DO know that it is exactly what was needed.
I laughed, I cried, I felt less alone, I felt distracted from the current nightmare unfolding around us. Scrubs literally saved my life on more than one occasion. The OG show got me through so much. I own the DVDs of the entire OG series and the med school spin off. My adopted mom took me to their live podcast in Seattle. She and my husband conspired to take me for my birthday. I love their podcast. And my adopted mom paid for a cameo from the Todd upon finishing M.A. school. This was the best medicine for my soul tonight. #scrubs #nostalgia #tv_shows #fakedoctorsrealfriends
item.dc:creator: TheSmellOfWineAndCheapPerfume

item.title: On the road again ... dump. Happy Monday all !
item.description:
Anything to avoid that ticket.
Beautiful evening.
Coloring inside the lines.
Cyberpunk.
Normal day on the highway.
To prevent a crash.
I feel like there is some sort of untoad story behind this.
Just make me a shower.
Never in a million years would I have guessed how this was going to play out.
My car people need me.
Cop forces the driver to clear snow off of the car!
My split in half truck people need me.
Older gentleman demonstrating some impressive driving skills.
That's his daily.
The Kelpies are a pair of 30-meter (100-foot) tall, 300-ton stainless-steel horse-head sculptures located in Falkirk, Scotland.
An suv is trying to exit from the passing lane.
The dangerous of road.
item.dc:creator: TerribleBot

item.title: PTGDump: Guess The Meme Theme
item.description:
Hello everyone! (Roy Kent voice) Better read all of these or else I start punching dicks
I would like a piece of the weed dick cake.
Always and forever
My kid loved Thomas the Tank engine when he was little, and his favorite was Percy. But he couldn't say his "R"s quite yet, so he pronounced it "Pussy." Everywhere we went, he'd take his Percy toy with him and proudly hold it up to people and say "Wanna see my pussy?" Fucking hysterical.
Same, kid.
Yuppp.
Hey, at least they're asking.
Mario Kart used to end in tears. Nobody gets a free pass in this house.
We can't help it. We are large and our lungs are mighty.
*Sips coffee from my Best Dad Ever mug and eyes you malevolently*
SERIOUSLY, WHAT THE FUCK
My son and I are often in cahoots like this. It's nice to be in cahoots.
Fucking gross.
He looks like such a little old man when he laughs!
Everyone must enjoy this modern Rice
Nope nope nope.
Solid dadding right there.
MV Edit: Thank you, parents of Imgur! Glad to know that there are dozens of us! Remember, I'm pullin' for you. We're all in this together. Thanks for reading everyone! This dump has been brought to you by... ...my gaming channel on the YouTubes! It's growing, and I want to take as many Imgur content creators along with me as I can. If you have a channel you want to promote, be it Twitch, YouTube or otherwise, let me know! Send me a link and I'll promote you in a future dump. And swing by the channel if you have some time to kill, or just need a pleasantly deep voice in the background while you do whatever. Right now, I'm playing Monkey Island 2! youtube.com/@PTGDad
item.dc:creator: PartTimeGamerDad

item.title: GovBrief Today #395
item.description: Three American troops were killed in Kuwait Sunday, two days after Donald Trump started a war he never asked Congress to authorize. Eight countries are now involved. The FBI is investigating a mass shooting in Austin as terrorism tied to the attack. Protesters breached the U.S. consulate in Karachi, Pakistan, and security forces killed at least ten of them. Two days in, the cost is landing on Americans at home and overseas. Trump told Fox News the war would take four weeks or less. U.S. intelligence agencies said Iran was months from a nuclear weapon, not the two weeks he used to justify the bombings. He's promising a quick war without Congress ever voting to start one. Call your representatives and demand they invoke the War Powers Act before this continues spreading. We've emailed 6,300+ stories over 395 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com [1] https://go.govbrief.today/austin-shooting [2] https://go.govbrief.today/pakistan-protests [3] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-mar1 [4] https://go.govbrief.today/4weeks-iran [5] https://go.govbrief.today/charlie-kirk-banner [6] https://go.govbrief.today/sf-ballet Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
